documents.title: Aanvullend Zorg- en Welzijnsakkoord (AZWA) (Definitief)
documents.publisher: Ministerie van Volksgezondheid, Welzijn en Sport
documents.inventory_notes: Definitive national agreement text and the main normative source for AZWA-wide D5/D6 extraction.

documents.title: Aanvullend Zorg- en Welzijnsakkoord - onderhandelaarsakkoord
documents.inventory_notes: Substantive predecessor agreement that is useful for tracing pre-final wording and commitments.

documents.title: CW 3.1 kader basisfunctionaliteiten en basisinfrastructuur D5 en D6
documents.publisher: Ministerie van Volksgezondheid, Welzijn en Sport
documents.inventory_notes: The most targeted D5/D6 framework document in the corpus, including finance and evaluation framing.

documents.title: Zorgzaam Flevoland 2023 Regioplan IZA Flevoland
documents.inventory_notes: Regional IZA implementation plan with strong governance, monitoring, and Almere relevance; it contains structured visuals, but not stable table evidence we currently want to treat as table-bearing for downstream extraction.

documents.title: Transformatieplan Positief Gezond Almere
documents.inventory_notes: Core local implementation source for Almere, but not itself a D5/D6 source document.

documents.title: Kamerbrief over CW 3.1 kaders voor AZWA onderdelen
documents.publisher: Ministerie van Volksgezondheid, Welzijn en Sport
documents.inventory_notes: Transmittal letter for the CW 3.1 annexes; useful for status and official framing rather than detailed extraction.

documents.title: Kamerbrief inzake voortgang Integraal Zorgakkoord (IZA) en Aanvullend Zorg- en Welzijnsakkoord (AZWA)
documents.publisher: Ministerie van Volksgezondheid, Welzijn en Sport
documents.inventory_notes: Progress letter with important implementation, monitoring, and regionalization details for D5/D6 rollout.

documents.title: Kamerbrief aanbieding Aanvullend Zorg- en Welzijnsakkoord (AZWA)
documents.publisher: Ministerie van Volksgezondheid, Welzijn en Sport
documents.inventory_notes: Short offering letter that confirms signature status and gives limited interpretive context.

documents.title: AZWA-afspraken D5 en D6 en financieringsinstrument
documents.publisher: Ministerie van Volksgezondheid, Welzijn en Sport
documents.inventory_notes: Official VWS letter to VNG on the D5/D6 agreements and the financing instrument, including the move toward a new SPUK for 2027-2029 and the municipal implementation framing for 2026.

documents.title: Opdracht voor de werkagenda samenwerking zorg en sociaal domein voor D5 AZWA
documents.inventory_notes: Operational source document for the D5 workagenda, with the concrete products, milestones, and regional-to-municipal process needed to unlock the AZWA middelen.

documents.title: Integraal Zorgakkoord: Samen werken aan gezonde zorg
documents.publisher: Ministerie van Volksgezondheid, Welzijn en Sport
documents.inventory_notes: Upstream national agreement that provides the main pre-AZWA governance and monitoring context.

documents.title: Format werkagenda basisfunctionaliteiten AZWA
documents.inventory_notes: Operational AZWA format for the D5 workagenda, useful for tracing which local and regional fields, planning elements, and implementation commitments are expected in 2026.

documents.title: GALA - Gezond en Actief Leven Akkoord
documents.publisher: Ministerie van Volksgezondheid, Welzijn en Sport
documents.inventory_notes: Upstream public-health and municipal implementation agreement relevant to prevention and social-basis context.

documents.title: Naar een positief gezond Almere; Beleidstheorie en businesscase transformatieplan
documents.inventory_notes: Commissioned research and business-case report that can support local claim and impact interpretation.

documents.title: Toelichting producten en proces
documents.inventory_notes: Short process note that explains the D5 workagenda products, the relation to the regioplan, and the target dates around 26 May, mid-September, and 15 November 2026.

documents.title: Regiobeeld Flevoland 2023
documents.inventory_notes: Regional baseline evidence report for needs, pressures, and context rather than normative policy content; the current corpus behaves as narrative/regional evidence, not as a reliable table source.

documents.title: Welke middelen zijn beschikbaar in het AZWA en hoe worden deze middelen verdeeld?
documents.inventory_notes: Practical VNG funding explainer; useful for implementation context but weaker than the underlying agreements.

documents.title: AZWA-financiering voor gemeenten (Zorgakkoord)
documents.inventory_notes: Current VNG ledenbrief that explains the new AZWA financing route for gemeenten and points to the required D5 workagenda, webinar, and municipal approval moment in November 2026.

documents.title: Is er rekening gehouden met de benodigde uitvoeringscapaciteit van gemeenten bij het AZWA?
documents.inventory_notes: Practical VNG implementation-capacity explainer with municipal relevance but low normative weight.

documents.title: Plan van aanpak 2024-2026 Brede SPUK/GALA Almere
documents.inventory_notes: Municipal plan of approach for Brede SPUK/GALA 2024-2026. Use for local prevention, financing, execution, and monitoring context; named officials or empty contact fields should not be promoted to public claims.

documents.title: Samen werken aan gezondheid en zorg - Visie gezondheidsbeleid Almere 2024-2026
documents.inventory_notes: Underlying municipal policy text for the Almere health-policy vision. It replaces the earlier Agendawijzer summary as the stronger local source for local prevention, health, and care-to-social-domain translation signals.

documents.title: Besluitenlijst Visie Gezondheidsbeleid Almere 2024-2026
documents.inventory_notes: Council decision-list source for the health-policy vision route. Use for local decision traceability, not for substantive policy expansion beyond what the decision list itself records.

documents.title: Raadsvoorstel Visie Gezondheidsbeleid Almere 2024-2026 - geamendeerd
documents.inventory_notes: Amended council proposal for the Almere health-policy vision. Use for governance, decision route, and local framing; do not treat as a national norm source.

documents.title: Maatschappelijke agenda 2024-2034
documents.inventory_notes: Agendawijzer summary page that points to underlying municipal documents rather than replacing them.

documents.title: Maatschappelijke agenda 2024-2034
documents.inventory_notes: Underlying municipal policy text for the Maatschappelijke agenda 2024-2034. It is the stronger local source for social-domain priorities, social basis, cooperation, monitoring, and long-term municipal context.

documents.title: Besluitenlijst Maatschappelijke agenda 2024-2034
documents.inventory_notes: Council decision-list source for the Maatschappelijke agenda route. Use for local decision traceability, not as a source for new substantive policy claims.

documents.title: Opzet procesevaluatie en monitor Sociaal Domein
documents.inventory_notes: Supporting evaluation and monitoring setup for the social domain. Use for monitoring design and review questions, not as a replacement for the adopted Maatschappelijke agenda itself.

documents.title: Raadsvoorstel Maatschappelijke agenda 2024-2034 - geamendeerd
documents.inventory_notes: Amended council proposal for the Maatschappelijke agenda. Use for governance, decision route, and local social-domain framing; keep process text separate from adopted policy content.

documents.title: Visie Gezondheidsbeleid Almere 2024-2026
documents.inventory_notes: Agendawijzer summary page with useful local policy signals but not the full policy text.

documents.title: Informatiepagina Sociaal Domein
documents.inventory_notes: General orientation page that links the local policy landscape but is not itself a source of detailed claims.

documents.title: Sociale staat van Almere
documents.inventory_notes: Gateway page that should eventually be replaced by the linked underlying reports.

documents.title: AZWA-financiering voor gemeenten (Zorgakkoord)
documents.inventory_notes: VNG landing page for the 22 April 2026 AZWA financing update, linking the ledenbrief and the attached workagenda documents that structure the 2026 municipal follow-up.

documents.title: Gezondheidsmonitor volwassenen en ouderen 2024 - Tabellenboek ouderen Flevoland gemeenten
documents.inventory_notes: Public GGD Flevoland municipality-level table book for residents aged 65 and older. Use as aggregate baseline evidence for Sprint 25.3 nulmeting fields such as valrisico, eenzaamheid, gezondheid, bewegen, kwetsbaarheid, mantelzorg, and participation. It is not individual-level health data.

documents.title: Gezondheidsmonitor volwassenen en ouderen 2024 - Tabellenboek volwassenen Flevoland gemeenten
documents.inventory_notes: Public GGD Flevoland municipality-level table book for adults aged 18-64. Use as aggregate baseline evidence for Sprint 25.3 nulmeting fields such as overgewicht, bewegen, eenzaamheid, mentale gezondheid, kwetsbaarheid, and participation. It is not individual-level health data.

documents.title: Valpreventie Gemeente Almere
documents.inventory_notes: Public Almere-specific GGD Flevoland page for the valpreventie service route. Use only for current operational execution evidence such as inloop, referral, advice, and course matching; avoid treating event details as durable policy.

documents.title: Doorontwikkeling Zorgzaam Flevoland naar een toekomstbestendige samenwerkingsstructuur
documents.inventory_notes: ZonMw project registration for development of Zorgzaam Flevoland. Use as supporting governance and collaboration evidence only; it is not an adopted local policy document or a complete mandate source.

documents.title: Specifieke uitkering transformatiemiddelen IZA & AZWA 2024-2028
documents.inventory_notes: Official DUS-I implementation page with concrete application and accountability deadlines for transformatiemiddelen; useful for timeline and municipal follow-up, but not itself the strongest norm.

documents.title: Regeling specifieke uitkering transformatiemiddelen IZA & AZWA 2024-2028
documents.publisher: Wetten.nl / Ministerie van Volksgezondheid, Welzijn en Sport
documents.inventory_notes: Formal regulation for SPUK transformatiemiddelen and therefore the strongest source in this repo for application windows, funding conditions, and accountability logic.

documents.title: Aanvullend Zorg- en Welzijnsakkoord
documents.inventory_notes: Official AZWA program page that aggregates updates, references, and practical follow-up material; useful for traceability and timeline discovery rather than as a standalone norm.

documents.title: Begroting 2026
documents.inventory_notes: Official Almere budget page that exposes local budget-cycle milestones and can later anchor municipal timing around financing and council decision moments.

documents.title: Gemeentefonds
documents.publisher: Ministerie van Binnenlandse Zaken en Koninkrijksrelaties
documents.inventory_notes: Official BZK information page for the gemeentefonds cycle; useful to anchor recurring financial moments such as the mei-, september-, and decembercirculaires in a source-backed way.

documents.title: Financiering IZA en AZWA: hoe zit het precies?
documents.inventory_notes: Sector commentary page that summarizes IZA/AZWA financing and mentions regional follow-up timing, including the additional regioplan trajectory; useful for timeline discovery and municipal follow-up, but intentionally treated as lower-authority duiding.

documents.title: Vergaderschema Raad van Almere 2026
documents.inventory_notes: Official Raad van Almere schedule page with political-market, election, and council-transition moments that can anchor local governance timing around later D5/D6 follow-up.

documents.title: Gezond en actief leven
documents.inventory_notes: Current VNG subject page for IZA, GALA, and AZWA support for municipalities; it is a better active replacement for the earlier dead VNG topic URL and helps trace practical municipal support signals.

documents.title: Ledenbrief onderhandelaarsakkoord AZWA
documents.inventory_notes: VNG members letter on the AZWA negotiation agreement, including municipal framing, financing, and a clear Q3 2026 regioplan timing reference; lower-authority than national norm text but stronger than sector commentary.

documents.title: Stevige Lokale Teams en inzet Investeringsfonds jeugd en gezin
documents.inventory_notes: Local council page for Stevige Lokale Teams and the youth/family investment fund; high-priority D6 responsibility evidence, but underlying Documentwijzer decision documents still need separate intake.

documents.title: Wijkteams Almere
documents.inventory_notes: Public baseline source for the existing Almere wijkteam access and support route.

documents.title: Richtinggevend kader toegang, lokale teams en integrale dienstverlening
documents.inventory_notes: National implementation framework for access, local teams and integrated services; use as assessment benchmark, not as an Almere decision.

documents.title: Basisfuncties voor lokale teams
documents.inventory_notes: Assessment framework for low-threshold, nearby and integrated local teams in the social domain.

documents.title: Begroting 2026 GGD Flevoland
documents.inventory_notes: Current GGD Flevoland budget source for governance, JGZ, Kennis en Advies, prevention, plustaken, inwonerbijdrage and GGD-region scale.

documents.title: Kennis en Advies
documents.inventory_notes: Public source for GGD Flevoland monitors, dashboards, epidemiology, data analysis and advice.

documents.title: Profiel Jeugdgezondheidszorg
documents.inventory_notes: Public source for JGZ Almere's 0-18 role, school links, youth support and care-chain function.

documents.title: Stevige Lokale Teams en inzet Investeringsfonds jeugd en gezin - geamendeerd raadsvoorstel
documents.inventory_notes: Geamendeerd local council proposal for Stevige Lokale Teams. Use as high-value local decision evidence, while still separating source-backed text from D6 classification choices.

documents.title: Stevige Lokale Teams en inzet Investeringsfonds jeugd en gezin - raadsvoorstel
documents.inventory_notes: Original local council proposal for Stevige Lokale Teams. Use for proposal logic and compare with the amended/adopted version before treating claims as settled.

documents.title: Stevige Lokale Teams en inzet Investeringsfonds jeugd en gezin - begrotingswijziging
documents.inventory_notes: Budget-change attachment for the Stevige Lokale Teams council route. Use for local money-flow evidence, not for national AZWA/D6 financing conclusions.

documents.title: Stevige Lokale Teams en inzet Investeringsfonds jeugd en gezin - besluitenlijst
documents.inventory_notes: Decision-list attachment for the Stevige Lokale Teams route. Use for decision traceability and voting/adoption status.

documents.title: Samenwerkingsprojecten
documents.inventory_notes: Public municipal project page for Samen Sterker in de Wijk and related Wonen & Zorg projects. Use as implementation evidence, not as formal D6 classification.

documents.title: Positief Gezond Almere
documents.inventory_notes: Current public PGA homepage. Use for current implementation context and themes, not as a replacement for the formal PGA transformation plan.

documents.title: Gezonde scholen
documents.inventory_notes: Municipal public page for Gezonde scholen in Almere. Use as source-backed local implementation evidence for the Gezonde School D6 validation row, not as formal D6 classification.

documents.title: Gezond in Almere
documents.inventory_notes: Municipal health/prevention gateway that places Gezonde School and mentale gezondheid in the same Almere public-health context. Use as context, not as owner or funding evidence.

documents.title: De Gezonde School
documents.inventory_notes: GGD Flevoland page for Gezonde School advisers and school health/wellbeing support. Use as regional implementation evidence; D6 ownership and mandate still need validation.

documents.title: Ketenaanpak gezond gewicht - Gezond Gewicht Almere
documents.inventory_notes: GGD Flevoland page for Gezond Gewicht Almere and the Pact met impact reference. Use as stable public anchor for the healthy-school/collective-prevention evidence cluster when the referenced PDF URL is unavailable to the local pipeline.

documents.title: LEA 2024-2028
documents.inventory_notes: Local Education Agenda page for Almere 2024-2028. Use for school-wellbeing, LEA partner and budget-context evidence; do not treat it as a D6 ownership decision.
